word: H8429 - תְּוַהּ - tᵉvahh - tev-ah' - Be astonied

sections.paragraph:
Original: תּוהּ

Transliteration: tevahh

Phonetic: tev-ah'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Peal) to be startled, be alarmed

Origin: corresponding to H8539 or perhaps to H7582 through the idea of sweeping to ruin [compare H8428]

TWOT entry: 3054

Part(s) of speech: Verb
